_comment: Data row has 36 fields against the combined 35-column header for month 2027-02 (one trailing extra field) -- file-level framing problem, same as wrong-column-count-too-few.csv: parseWorkforceCsv() throws WorkforceCsvRowShapeError before any per-row processing.
call: parseWorkforceCsv(csvText, month) -- throws before importCsv's per-row loop is reached
